title: Photographic Evidence
description: When Kid-2 and Kid-3 quietly share a book without arguing, Grandma Kelly tells Pa to take a picture because nobody will believe they were actually getting along.
alt: Kid-3 and Kid-2 sit together peacefully on a large blue beanbag in a children’s library, smiling as they share a colorful picture book. Kid-3 is barefoot with her stuffed bunny beside her, while Kid-2 points at the page. Grandma Kelly, wearing an apron labeled Grandma, and Pa peek around a bookshelf. Pa holds up his phone as Grandma says, 'Quick, take a picture. Nobody’s going to believe this.'
